**Line height: minimum 150% for all body copy**
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
box `border-radius: 40px 8px 40px 8px;` in `TL TR BR BL` order
large on **top-left + bottom-right**, near-point on **top-right + bottom-left**, a **5:1 ratio**
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work
rounded line caps, single-color line work
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops
no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.
